descriptions: GAS Gang had affiliations with Roadside G's.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Brooklyn, GAS Gang , Ghetto Boys , OC (Organised Crime) , Roadside G's

descriptions: Klan and National Socialist Party of America jointly attacked communist protesters.
edges.evidence_quote: On November 3, 1979, the Klan and the National Socialist Party of America killed five communist protesters in Greensboro, North Carolina

descriptions: F-side lists S.C.F. Hooligans as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: S.C.F. Hooligans

descriptions: Hai San was allied with the Tokong society, which financed tin mining.

descriptions: The Duhre group is listed as a rival of the Red Scorpions in the infobox.

descriptions: Bloque Metro subcontracted the Banda de la Terraza for operations.
edges.evidence_quote: el Bloque Metro desarrolló una modalidad de subcontratación con organizaciones criminales de alta capacidad operativa, como la banda de la Terraza

descriptions: Oficina de Envigado controlled the operations of Banda La Terraza.
edges.evidence_quote: La Oficina controlaba la operación de una banda que, en su tiempo, fue uno de los grupos sicariales más temidos en el país: La Terraza

descriptions: La Terraza is a subgroup controlled by Oficina de Envigado.
edges.evidence_quote: La Terraza, a gang of the most feared hit men in the country, is also under La Oficina's control.

Mexikanemi.description: Mexikanemi, also known as the Texas Mexican Mafia, is a Mexican-American prison and street gang established in the Texas state prison system in 1984. It operates independently from the California Mexican Mafia and engages in drug trafficking, loan sharking, money laundering, and other illegal activities. The gang has a formal written constitution and a hierarchical structure. It is based in Texas and remains active.

descriptions: Mexikanemi is listed as an ally of Mexican Mafia in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Armenian Power , Aryan Brotherhood , Gambino crime family , Hells Angels MC (1960s–1980s) , Independent Soldiers , Los Angeles crime family , Mexikanemi , Mongols MC , MS-13 , Sinaloa Cartel , Sureños , Tijuana Cartel

descriptions: Mexikanemi is allied with the Gulf Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Gulf Cartel , Juárez Cartel , Mexican Mafia , Los Zetas

descriptions: Mexikanemi is allied with the Juárez Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Gulf Cartel , Juárez Cartel , Mexican Mafia , Los Zetas

descriptions: Mexikanemi is allied with Los Zetas.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Gulf Cartel , Juárez Cartel , Mexican Mafia , Los Zetas

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Nuestra Familia , Texas Syndicate

descriptions: Mexikanemi has a rivalry with the Texas Syndicate.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Nuestra Familia , Texas Syndicate

descriptions: Mexikanemi is a rival of Nuestra Familia per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Mexikanemi

descriptions: Mexikanemi is an enemy of Nuestra Familia.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Hermandad Aria , Bulldogs de Fresno , Mafia mexicana , Mexikanemi , Sindicato de Texas , Sureños

descriptions: Puro Tango Blast formed for protection from Mexikanemi, indicating a conflict relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: Incarcerated Hispanic men from major Texas cities (including Houston , Dallas , Fort Worth , Austin ), have banded together for protection from established security threat groups like Mexikanemi and the Texas Syndicate .

descriptions: Mexikanemi listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Aryan Brotherhood, Nuestra Familia, Mexican Mafia, Mexikanemi, Tango Blast

descriptions: La infobox lista a Mexikanemi como enemigo del Sindicato de Texas.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Hermandad Aria, Mafia mexicana, Mexikanemi, Nuestra Familia, Puro Tango Blast

descriptions: Bellocco supported the D'Alessandro clan in drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: the Camorra D'Alessandro clan, who with the support of the Bellocco and Pesce 'ndrine, were able to supply the entire region

Clan De Luca Bossa.description: Camorra clan operating in the eastern suburbs of Naples, specifically Ponticelli and Cercola. Founded by Antonio De Luca Bossa, known as 'o sicco, born in 1971. The clan was hostile to the Fusco-Ponticelli and Sarno clans, engaging in a bloody war for territorial control. After the arrest of its founder and the killing of his successor Giuseppe Mignano, the clan was eliminated by the Sarno clan.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan supported the De Luca Bossa clan against the Sarnos.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan, in fact, is the first to offer support to the De Luca Bossa clan against the Sarnos, in the times of the violent feud between the two organizations.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan is allied with the De Luca Bossa clan.
edges.evidence_quote: According to the latest DIA reports, the Aprea-Cuccaro clan is allied with the Rinaldi clan from San Giovanni a Teduccio , and with the De Luca Bossa clan from Ponticelli , with the intention of undermining the Mazzarella clan.

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan formed a criminal alliance with the De Luca Bossa clan and the Rinaldi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the new criminal alliance formed with the De Luca Bossa clan and the Rinaldi clan

descriptions: The De Luca Bossa clan is a subgroup of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Camorra's organizational structure is divided into individual groups called 'clans'.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa were protected by ties with Aprea-Cuccaro.
edges.evidence_quote: protetti dai legami con gli Aprea-Cuccaro

descriptions: The Aprea-Cuccaro clan is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Marfella clan, Rinaldi clan, Secondigliano Alliance, Aprea-Cuccaro clan

descriptions: Cepparulo was a member of Barbudos, killed by De Luca Bossa associates.
edges.evidence_quote: Raffaele Cepparulo, ritenuto esponente del cosiddetto clan dei Barbudos

descriptions: De Luca Bossa was hostile to the cartel formed by Fusco-Ponticelli and Sarno.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan De Luca Bossa fu ostile al cartello formato dai clan Fusco-Ponticelli e Sarno.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa and Marfella fought the Lago clan.
edges.evidence_quote: le forze dei due clan si uniscono nel combattere il clan Lago

descriptions: The De Luca Bossa and Marfella clans fought against the Lago clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the forces of the two clans united in fighting the Lago clan.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa and Marfella united to fight the Lago clan.
edges.evidence_quote: grazie alla frequentazione di Teresa De Luca Bossa con Giuseppe Marfella, boss di Pianura, le forze dei due clan si uniscono nel combattere il clan Lago

descriptions: The De Luca Bossa and Marfella clans united to fight the Lago clan.
edges.evidence_quote: thanks to the relationship between Teresa De Luca Bossa, mother of Antonio, with Giuseppe Marfella, boss of the Marfella clan, based in Pianura, the forces of the two clans united in fighting the Lago clan.

descriptions: Minichini-De Luca Bossa showed superiority over Mariano.
edges.evidence_quote: per mostrare superiorità nei confronti del clan Mariano

descriptions: The Mariano clan is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sarno clan (defunct), De Micco clan, Mazzarella clan, Mariano clan

descriptions: De Luca Bossa alliance aimed to oust Mazzarella.
edges.evidence_quote: con l’intento di imporsi nell’area est di Napoli scalzando i Mazzarella

descriptions: The Mazzarella clan is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sarno clan (defunct), De Micco clan, Mazzarella clan, Mariano clan

descriptions: Minichini and De Luca Bossa formed a joint group.
edges.evidence_quote: clan camorristico dei “Minichini-De Luca Bossa”

descriptions: De Luca Bossa clan merged with Minichini group.
edges.evidence_quote: After a time inactive, the De Luca Bossa clan is believed to be gaining power again in the eastern area of Naples... thanks to the merger with emergent groups as the Minichini and Schisa.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa and Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno were opposed in a long bloody feud.
edges.evidence_quote: La lunga e sanguinosa faida che ha visto contrapposte negli anni le famiglie De Luca Bossa e Misso-Mazzarella-Sarno

descriptions: De Luca Bossa was hostile to the cartel formed by Fusco-Ponticelli and Sarno.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan De Luca Bossa fu ostile al cartello formato dai clan Fusco-Ponticelli e Sarno.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa clan fought a bloody war against the Sarno clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan was founded by Antonio De Luca Bossa... and was famous for the bloody war against the once powerful Sarno clan.

descriptions: The De Luca Bossa clan fought a war with the Sarno clan over territory.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 90s, Antonio became a trusted member of the Sarno clan, however, he decided to create his own clan, which ended in a bloody war between the then newly created clan and the Sarnos for the control of the territory.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa was rival to D'Amico and De Micco.
edges.evidence_quote: disputato da clan rivali, come i clan D'Amico (detti fraulella) e i clan De Micco (detti i bodo)

descriptions: The D'Amico clan was a rival disputing territory with the De Luca Bossa clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the clan gradually lost control of the territory, disputed by rival clans, such as the D'Amico clan (called Fraulella) and the De Micco clan (called Bodo).

descriptions: De Luca Bossa allied with Rinaldi.
edges.evidence_quote: alleandosi con gli Aprea di Barra e ai Rinaldi di San Giovanni a Teduccio

descriptions: The De Luca Bossa clan formed a criminal alliance with the Aprea-Cuccaro clan and the Rinaldi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: the new criminal alliance formed with the De Luca Bossa clan and the Rinaldi clan

descriptions: The De Luca Bossa clan formed an alliance with the Rinaldi clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Minichini was known to have a good relationship with Ciro Rinaldi, boss of the Rinaldi clan, also based in the eastern part of Naples, making an alliance between the two clans.

descriptions: De Luca Bossa allied with Schisa, Aprea, and Rinaldi.
edges.evidence_quote: unito agli Schisa, costola dell’ex clan Sarno, alleandosi con gli Aprea di Barra e ai Rinaldi

descriptions: De Luca Bossa clan merged with Schisa group.
edges.evidence_quote: After a time inactive, the De Luca Bossa clan is believed to be gaining power again in the eastern area of Naples... thanks to the merger with emergent groups as the Minichini and Schisa.

descriptions: The De Luca Bossa clan allied with the Secondigliano Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: In the years when Teresa De Luca Bossa was in command, the clan also made an alliance with the powerful Secondigliano Alliance.

descriptions: Teresa De Luca Bossa was a member of the Alleanza di Secondigliano.
edges.evidence_quote: membro di quel cartello conosciuto come Alleanza di Secondigliano

descriptions: Infobox lists De Luca Bossa clan as a rival of Mazzarella clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Secondigliano Alliance Contini clan, Licciardi clan, Mallardo clan, Rinaldi clan, De Luca Bossa clan, Vollaro clan, Aprea-Cuccaro clan

descriptions: Clan Sarno was in conflict with the De Luca Bossa clan.
edges.evidence_quote: contro il clan De Luca Bossa

descriptions: The Sarno clan (allied with Misso) fought against the De Luca Bossa clan (part of Alleanza di Secondigliano).
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra i Sarno e i De Luca Bossa : questa faida può essere considerata come una sorta di "spin-off" della faida tra i Misso e l' Alleanza di Secondigliano , essendo i primi alleati dei Sarno e i secondi inglobati nell'Alleanza

descriptions: The Rinaldi clan formed an alliance with the De Luca Bossa clan in 2019.
edges.evidence_quote: Since 2019 the clan has formed an alliance with the Ponticelli 's De Luca Bossa clan , and Barra 's Aprea-Cuccaro clan , called by the media Rinaldi-De Luca Bossa-Aprea

descriptions: De Luca Bossa clan is a founding clan and ally of the Secondigliano Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Founding clans : Contini clan , Licciardi clan , Mallardo clan , Di Lauro clan , Rinaldi clan , De Luca Bossa clan , Aprea-Cuccaro clan , Commisso 'ndrina

descriptions: MOVADEF is a political wing branch of Shining Path.
edges.evidence_quote: It has two main branches, MOVADEF (2009–2024) and FUDEPP

Cotroni crime family.description: The Cotroni crime family was an Italian Canadian crime family based in Montreal, Quebec, established in the 1940s by Vincenzo Cotroni. It was considered a branch of the Bonanno crime family of New York City. The family controlled territory in southern Quebec and Ontario, engaging in racketeering, drug trafficking, and other illegal activities. An internal war in the late 1970s led to the rise of the Sicilian Rizzuto faction, and the family became defunct by the 2000s.

descriptions: Lo Presti formed alliances with the Cotroni family in Montreal.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto rapporti di affari con la Famiglia Inzerillo -Spatola-Gambino di Palermo , attraverso la quale strinse alleanze anche oltreoceano con la Famiglia Gambino di New York e con le famiglie della 'Ndrangheta in Canada degli Zito , dei Commisso , dei Racco, degli Stalteri a Toronto e dei Cotroni a Montréal .

descriptions: Bonanno family is allied with Cotroni crime family per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Cotroni crime family

descriptions: Bonanno family cooperated with Cotroni family in heroin smuggling.
edges.evidence_quote: Carmine Galante to Montreal ... to supervise the family drug business there, where he worked with the Calabrian Vincenzo Cotroni of the Cotroni family in the French Connection heroin smuggling scheme.

descriptions: The Bonanno crime family had influence over the Cotroni crime family in Canada.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bonanno crime family and the Buffalo crime family also had influence in several factions in Canada including the Rizzuto crime family and Cotroni crime family, and the Luppino crime family and Papalia crime family, respectively.

descriptions: The Bonanno family influenced the Cotroni family in Canada.
edges.evidence_quote: La familia criminal Bonanno ... tuvo también influencia en varias facciones en Canadá incluyendo a ... la familia criminal Cotroni

descriptions: Magaddino (Buffalo boss) planned to kill Vic Cotroni of the Cotroni family, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1966, when Magaddino planned to have Vic Cotroni killed for his loyalty to Joe Bonanno, Luppino persuaded him to abandon the murder plot.

descriptions: The Blass gang is listed as a rival of the Cotroni family.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Blass gang, Dubois gang, Rizzuto crime family, Rock Machine MC

descriptions: The FBI classifies the Cotroni family as a faction of the Bonanno crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: The FBI considers both the Cotronis and the Rizzutos to be factions of the Bonanno family

descriptions: The Cotroni family was considered a branch of the Bonanno family.
edges.evidence_quote: The United States Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) considered the family a branch of the Bonanno crime family of New York City.

descriptions: The Cotroni family is a satellite of the Bonanno family.
edges.evidence_quote: The Montreal-based Cotroni crime family, the Canadian satellite of New York's Bonanno crime family

descriptions: The Commisso 'ndrina is listed as an ally of the Cotroni family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family, Commisso 'ndrina, Hells Angels MC, West End Gang

descriptions: The Dubois gang is listed as a rival of the Cotroni family.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Blass gang, Dubois gang, Rizzuto crime family, Rock Machine MC

descriptions: The Hells Angels MC is listed as an ally of the Cotroni family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family, Commisso 'ndrina, Hells Angels MC, West End Gang

descriptions: The Cotroni and Rizzuto families were factions within the same organization and engaged in a violent power struggle.
edges.evidence_quote: As tensions grew into a power struggle between the Calabrian and Sicilian factions of the family, a mob war began in 1973.

descriptions: The Rizzuto faction overtook the Cotroni family after an internal war.
edges.evidence_quote: This allowed the Sicilian Rizzuto faction to overtake the Cotroni's Calabrian faction as the preeminent crime family in Montreal.

descriptions: The two crime families were rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Cotroni was a member of the Calabrian 'Ndrangheta Cotroni crime family who were the rivals of the Sicilian Mafia Rizzuto crime family.

descriptions: The Cotroni and Rizzuto families were rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Cotroni was a member of the Calabrian 'Ndrangheta Cotroni crime family who were the rivals of the Sicilian Mafia Rizzuto crime family.

descriptions: The Rock Machine MC is listed as a rival of the Cotroni family.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Blass gang, Dubois gang, Rizzuto crime family, Rock Machine MC

descriptions: The Cotroni family used the Krays to sell stolen bonds in Britain.
edges.evidence_quote: The Montreal-based Cotroni crime family, the Canadian satellite of New York's Bonanno crime family, decided to sell the stolen bonds in Britain through the Krays.

descriptions: The West End Gang is listed as an ally of the Cotroni family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family, Commisso 'ndrina, Hells Angels MC, West End Gang

descriptions: The Dubois Brothers rivaled the Cotroni family for control in Montreal.
edges.evidence_quote: By the 1960s the Dubois Brothers were gaining control and were becoming the only crime group in Montreal that were considered to rival the Cotroni family in the 1960s and 1970s.

descriptions: Paolo Violi, associated with the Luppino family, developed connections with the Cotroni family.
edges.evidence_quote: In Montreal, Violi developed connections with the Cotroni crime family , while maintaining ties with the Luppino family

descriptions: Paolo Violi, a member of the Luppino-Violi family, joined the Cotroni family.
edges.evidence_quote: Paolo Violi (1931 - 1978), figlio di Domenico. Trasferitosi in Canada nel 1951, entra a fare parte della famiglia Cotroni.

descriptions: Rizzuto family fought and overtook Cotroni family in a war.
edges.evidence_quote: An internal war within the Cotroni family broke out by the late 1970s which resulted in the death of acting captain Paolo Violi and his brothers, allowing the Rizzutos to overtake the Cotronis as the city's preeminent crime family.

descriptions: Infobox lists Cotroni as rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Cotroni crime family

descriptions: Rizzuto family overtook Cotroni family after an internal war in the late 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: An internal war within the Cotroni family broke out by the late 1970s which resulted in the death of acting captain Paolo Violi and his brothers, allowing the Rizzutos to overtake the Cotronis as the city's preeminent crime family.

descriptions: Rizzuto family fought and overtook Cotroni family in an internal war.
edges.evidence_quote: An internal war within the Cotroni family broke out by the late 1970s which resulted in the death of acting captain Paolo Violi and his brothers, allowing the Rizzutos to overtake the Cotronis as the city's preeminent crime family.

descriptions: Rizzuto family originated as part of Cotroni family's Sicilian faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Nicolo Rizzuto ... established the organization in the 1970s as part of the Sicilian faction of the Montreal-based Cotroni crime family.

descriptions: Rizzuto family originated as a faction of the Cotroni family.
edges.evidence_quote: Nicolo Rizzuto ... established the organization in the 1970s as part of the Sicilian faction of the Montreal-based Cotroni crime family.

descriptions: Rock Machine killed a member of the Cotroni crime family to gain favor with the Rizzutos.
edges.evidence_quote: a team of Rock Machine killers ... gunned down Paolo Cotroni ... partly to gain the favor of the Rizzutos

descriptions: The Rock Machine killed a Cotroni family member to gain favor with the Rizzutos.
edges.evidence_quote: Cotroni was a member of the Calabrian 'Ndrangheta Cotroni crime family who were the rivals of the Sicilian Mafia Rizzuto crime family. Cotroni was killed partly to gain the favor of the Rizzutos and partly because he was a friend of Boucher.

descriptions: Michele Racco, head of the Siderno Group, maintained close contacts with the Cotroni crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: He maintained close contacts with ... the Cotroni crime family in Montreal.

descriptions: West End Gang and Cotroni family jointly committed a bank robbery.
edges.evidence_quote: the theft of some $20,000 in cash from the vault of the Brockville Trust & Saving Company in Brockville on 4 May 1958 was a joint operation of the West End Gang and the Cotroni family.

descriptions: Mano Negra is listed as a group under Black Eagles.
edges.evidence_quote: Groups - Mano Negra: operating in Putumayo (unknown number of members).

descriptions: A former Rodents MC member was affiliated with Hells Angels and involved in a murder investigation.
edges.evidence_quote: A former member of Rodents Motorcycle Club, who was affiliated with the Hells Angels, was arrested along with two other men who, according to the police investigation, had been in the car before the murder.

descriptions: Falange Armata claimed responsibility for a massacre committed by the White Uno Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The massacre was immediately claimed by the terrorist group Falange Armata.

descriptions: The two sets held a peace meeting in 2022, which was successful in preventing further homicides.
edges.evidence_quote: Skipp Townsend held a peace meeting over brunch with the rivaling Rollin' 60s Crips and Inglewood Family Bloods at a restaurant in Manhattan Beach.

descriptions: UAB has Oklahoma Irish Mob Gang as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Aryan Circle, Oklahoma Irish Mob Gang

descriptions: The Emanuele family is one of the families belonging to the Locale di Ariola.
edges.evidence_quote: famiglie Loielo, Gallace , Emanuele, Maiolo

edges.evidence_quote: famiglie Loielo, Gallace , Emanuele, Maiolo

descriptions: The Loielo 'ndrina is part of the Locale di 'Ndrangheta dell'Ariola.
edges.evidence_quote: I Loielo sono una 'ndrina di Ariola ... appartenenti al Locale di 'Ndrangheta dell'Ariola

descriptions: The Maiolo family is one of the families belonging to the Locale di Ariola.
edges.evidence_quote: famiglie Loielo, Gallace , Emanuele, Maiolo

descriptions: The Roosevelt, Long Island set of Rollin' 60s feuded with Roosevelt Bloods.
edges.evidence_quote: This set had been established in 2003 and was responsible for dozens of shootings over the years as part of a feud with the Roosevelt Bloods gang.

Errol Flynns.description: The Errol Flynns were a street gang founded on the lower east side of Detroit, Michigan, United States during the 1970s. They were known for their flamboyant dress and use of hand signs, and engaged in extortion, robbery, and drug trafficking. The gang collapsed in the 1980s due to the rise of crack cocaine and prosecution of leaders.

descriptions: The Errol Flynns are recognized as the precursors to these successor gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the most notable successors include the "Be Like Boys", "Dexter Boys" (an offshoot of YBI), "Schoolcraft Boys or SCB's", "SNS", "Fenkell Boys", "FMK" ("Fenkell Mafia Killers"), "7 Mile Killers or 7 Mile Dogs", "Linwood Boys", "Brewster Boys", "Jeffries Boys", and "8 Mile sconys", ("JBFL") "Joy Boys" or "Exit 9" All of these crews, excepting the "Be Like Boys" gang, are named after Detroit city streets or housing projects and some of these gangs still exist under new leadership.

descriptions: The Errol Flynns are recognized as the precursors to these successor gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the most notable successors include the "Be Like Boys", "Dexter Boys" (an offshoot of YBI), "Schoolcraft Boys or SCB's", "SNS", "Fenkell Boys", "FMK" ("Fenkell Mafia Killers"), "7 Mile Killers or 7 Mile Dogs", "Linwood Boys", "Brewster Boys", "Jeffries Boys", and "8 Mile sconys", ("JBFL") "Joy Boys" or "Exit 9" All of these crews, excepting the "Be Like Boys" gang, are named after Detroit city streets or housing projects and some of these gangs still exist under new leadership.

edges.evidence_quote: Some of the most notable successors include the "Be Like Boys", "Dexter Boys" (an offshoot of YBI), "Schoolcraft Boys or SCB's", "SNS", "Fenkell Boys", "FMK" ("Fenkell Mafia Killers"), "7 Mile Killers or 7 Mile Dogs", "Linwood Boys", "Brewster Boys", "Jeffries Boys", and "8 Mile sconys", ("JBFL") "Joy Boys" or "Exit 9" All of these crews, excepting the "Be Like Boys" gang, are named after Detroit city streets or housing projects and some of these gangs still exist under new leadership.

McCarthy-Dundon.description: The McCarthy-Dundon gang is a criminal organization based in Limerick City, Ireland, involved in drug dealing, extortion, and armed robbery. Founded in the 2000s by James McCarthy and Dessie Dundon, the gang has been a central player in the Limerick feud, which has claimed up to 13 lives. The gang has been responsible for high-profile murders of innocent people and has been largely inactive since 2010 after its leaders were imprisoned.

descriptions: The Hutch gang is allied with the McCarthy-Dundon Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Keane-Collopy Gang , McCarthy-Dundon Gang , RIRA , New IRA

descriptions: Keane-Collopy gang is in conflict with the McCarthy-Dundon gang as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: McCarthy-Dundon Gang

descriptions: The infobox lists the Hutch Organised Crime Gang as an ally of the McCarthy-Dundon Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hutch Organised Crime Gang, Ryan Gang

descriptions: The McCarthy-Dundon Gang and the Keane-Collopy Gang are both participants in the Limerick feud, which is a conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The feud, which involves several criminal families, mainly the McCarthy-Dundons, the Ryans and the Keane-Collopy gang from St. Mary's Park, has been ongoing since 2000.

descriptions: The McCarthy-Dundon Gang and the Ryan Gang are both participants in the Limerick feud, which is a conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The feud, which involves several criminal families, mainly the McCarthy-Dundons, the Ryans and the Keane-Collopy gang from St. Mary's Park, has been ongoing since 2000.

descriptions: The infobox lists the Ryan Gang as an ally of the McCarthy-Dundon Gang, despite the text describing them as participants in the same feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hutch Organised Crime Gang, Ryan Gang

The Americans (gang).description: The Americans is a large street gang and organized crime group based in the Cape Flats area of Cape Town, South Africa. Founded in 1983 by Neville Harold (Jackie Lonte), it is a corporate body for many smaller gangs and is aligned with the 26 and 27 prison number gangs. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, abalone poaching, and other criminal activities. It has an estimated 30,000 members and its headquarters is called The White House.

descriptions: Hard Livings and The Americans are the two super gangs in Cape Town, implying rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hard Livings used to be one of two 'super gangs' in Cape Town with the other one being The Americans .

descriptions: Hard Livings competed with The Americans for drug distribution.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang started out as a criminal street gang mostly involved in drug distribution for which they competed with the Americans gang.

descriptions: The Americans are aligned with the 26 and 27 prison number gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Americans are aligned to the 26 and 27 prison number gang, whilst the British are aligned to the 28 prison number gang.

Sio Sam Ong.description: Sio Sam Ong is a leading Chinese triad in Malaysia, based in Penang and Selangor, with strong presence in northern states like Kedah and Perlis. Established in the 1940s-1950s, it is considered one of the most powerful triads in the country, primarily composed of Hokkien ethnic group. The organization is involved in international drug trafficking, kidnapping, murder, extortion, racketeering, and loansharking, and has been linked to multiple murders in Penang in the late 1980s and early 1990s.

descriptions: Ah Kong built strong ties with Sio Sam Ong.
edges.evidence_quote: over the years they had built strong ties with the infamous Penang -based Sio Sam Ong

descriptions: Barriox13 has clashed with Campanella Park Piru.
edges.evidence_quote: It has also clashed with black gangs such as the Campanella Park Piru, 135th St Piru, and West Side Piru, although it has an alliance with Gardena 13 and the Mexican Mafia.

Clan Giuliano.description: The Clan Giuliano is a Camorra organization based in central Naples, founded by Pio Vittorio Giuliano in the 1950s. It was one of the most powerful criminal groups in Campania from the 1970s to the 1990s, involved in cigarette smuggling, drug trafficking, and counterfeiting. The clan operated in neighborhoods such as Forcella, San Gaetano, Maddalena, Piazza Garibaldi, and Piazza Mercato. Several family members became pentiti (collaborators with justice), leading to its decline.

descriptions: Piromalli subdued the Giuliano through homicides.
edges.evidence_quote: porta alla luce 37 omicidi i quali piegano i Versace, i Priolo e i Giuliano

descriptions: Giuliano clan is a constituent clan of the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: the Giuliano clan, from Forcella, named after Pio Vittorio Giuliano;

edges.evidence_quote: Il clan Cappello vanta legami anche con altri gruppi criminali ... clan Giuliano di Pachino (SR)

edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni '80 i Di Biasi erano la longa manus dei Giuliano nei Quartieri Spagnoli.

Dall'altra si organizzarono, per combattere il clan Mazzarella, altri giovanissimi imparentati con i Giuliano.
